title: Tomtaru's Stellaris & Immersive Engineering Tweaks
description: A small bridge between Stellaris and Immersive Engineering. Allows processing of alien resources and fuel in IE multiblocks
body:
# Tomtaru's Stellaris & Immersive Engineering Tweaks
Integration mod adding Immersive Engineering processing recipes for Stellaris ores and materials.

- Full crusher and arc furnace support for Stellaris metals.
- Refinery recipes to produce Stellaris fuel and diesel.
- Dust processing for corronium, desh, neptunium, solerium, and tharsite.
- Adds stellaris Plutonium and Uranium blocks as heat sources for the thermoelectric generator.
- Uses common tags (c:) for maximum cross-mod compatibility.
- Requires both Stellaris and Immersive Engineering to function.
